           +--------+
           |  Sink  |
           +--------+
                ^
                |
    +--+----+---+--+----+---+
+---+--+    +---+--+    +---+--+
|  T1  |    |  T2  |    |  T3  |
+------+    +------+    +------+
    ^           ^           ^
    +-----------+-----------+
                |
          +-----+----+
          |  Source  |
          +----------+
